arts.ttl: Wolves boss slams wantaway Mario Lemina after he refuses to play: 'I don't need him'
arts.sum: Mario Lemina has asked Wolves to leave the club in the January transfer window, and while he had continued to be available to new boss Vitor Pereira, he didn't want to travel to Newcastle for Wednesday night's 3-0 defeat

arts.ttl: Howe hails Isak's 'composure' as striker scores again
arts.sum: Newcastle United head coach Eddie Howe praised the "composure and finishing" of Alexander Isak, who scored twice in a 3-0 win against Wolves that saw the Magpies in their ninth game in a row in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak matches three Premier League icons after what he did in thumping Newcastle win
arts.sum: Alexander Isak continued his sensational form as he scored for the eighth game running - setting himself apart from Newcastle United icon Alan Shearer in the process

arts.ttl: Newcastle United player ratings as record breaker scoops 10/10 in Wolves thrashing
arts.sum: Isak collected his second after Bruno Guimaraes' slotted him in on 57 minutes before the Sweden star turned provider to hand Anthony Gordon a tap in. Alexander Isak soared further into Newcastle United greatness by surging past Alan Shearer and Joe Willock into the record books by scoring in his eighth consecutive game.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak fires Newcastle into the top 4 of the Premier League
arts.sum: A 2-0 loss at home to Crystal Palace leaves the 2016 champion second from bottom of the standings and without a league win since Van Nistelrooy’s first game in charge at the start of December. But he couldn’t inspire his relegation-threatened team to victory as Ollie Watkins’ goal six minutes into the second half sealed Villa’s win.

arts.ttl: Isak extends hot streak to sink Wolves and lift Newcastle into top four
arts.athr: Louise Taylor at St James' Park
arts.sum: Newcastle’s sixth straight Premier League win – and ninth in all competitions – lifted Eddie Howe’s renascent team to fourth place as Alexander Isak demonstrated precisely why his manager believes he is a good as any striker in the world right now. Isak’s 16th and 17th goals of an extraordinary season pushed Wolves into the relegation zone, nudging them below fourth bottom Ipswich on goal difference. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United next five fixtures compared to Chelsea, Man City and rivals after Wolves win
arts.sum: Newcastle have been further boosted at the news on Tuesday that top four rivals Manchester City, Nottingham Forest and Chelsea dropped points. February 15 vs Manchester City (A) at 3pm - Premier League

arts.ttl: Newcastle 3-0 Wolves: Highlights, man of the match, stats as red-hot Alexander Isak joins special group of goalscorers
arts.sum: Alexander Isak scores twice and provides an assist as Newcastle United move into fourth spot in the Premier League table courtesy of a 3-0 home success over Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak on target again as in-form Newcastle beat Wolves
arts.sum: The Sweden international has scored 16 goals in as many games.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak fires Newcastle to all-time record-equalling win
arts.sum: Newcastle United made history with a Premier League victory over Wolves on Wednesday night.
